---
title: "Erich Trieschman"
toc: false
---

Placeholder homepage. Replace this with your bio, links, etc.

::: {.callout-note}
Edit `index.qmd` to populate this page. Markdown works; so do Jupyter code cells if you want live data.
:::

## Around the site

- **[Papers](papers.qmd)** — publications
- **[Garden](garden.qmd)** — live dashboard for my home garden tracker

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/etrieschman)
